name: French Caramel Pecan Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg Pillsbury Moist French Vanilla Cake Mix
1 can Caramel Pecan or Coconut Pecan Frosting, Pillsbury
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 15x10x1-inch baking pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Melt butter and place in a large bowl. Set aside 3 tablespoons of the cake mix.
4. Add remaining cake mix, melted butter, egg, oats, and chocolate chips to the bowl; blend well.
5. Stir in chopped pecans.
6. Press about 2 1/2 cups of the cake mixture into the bottom of the sprayed pan.
7. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, place frosting and microwave on HIGH for 1 minute.
8. Add reserved 3 tablespoons of cake mix to the frosting; stir until large lumps disappear.
9. Drizzle half of the frosting over the cake mixture in the pan; spread evenly.
10. Sprinkle with additional chocolate chips and pecans.
11. Drizzle remaining frosting over the top.
12. Crumble remaining cake mixture over the frosting.
13. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and edges are bubbly.
14. Cool completely before cutting into bars (48 bars).
